Further analysis shows that these heads are partly shared across modalities yet remain dynamic within each modality, with image retrieval heads changing more than text retrieval heads as context length and haystack modality change. Without further training, we find that these heads can also be used directly to rank visually rich documents: on MMDocIR, Qwen3-VL-8B selected-head scoring improves Recall@1 by 7.7/7.4 macro/micro points for page retrieval and 6.3/6.8 points for layout retrieval over the strongest reported baseline.

</details>


### [113] [A Dynamic Programming Framework for Discovering Count and Values of Multilevel Image Thresholding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27287)
*Eslam Hegazy,Mohamed Gabr*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于动态规划和改进最小误差阈值(MET)准则的多级图像阈值分割方法(MET-DP)，能自动确定合适的阈值数量，在计算效率上优于传统动态规划方法，但在SSIM和PSNR指标上略逊于需人工设定阈值数的传统方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有阈值分割方法大多需要用户预先指定阈值数量，而能自动确定合适阈值数的方法更具优势。

Method: 提出一种结合动态规划算法与改进最小误差阈值(MET)准则的新阈值分割方法，并通过实证统计研究分析其优越性。

Result: MET-DP方法在阈值数量较多时比传统动态规划方法耗时更少，且能为大多数测试图像自动检测出合适的阈值数量；但在SSIM和PSNR指标上低于需人工设定阈值数的传统方法。

Conclusion: MET-DP是一种高效、自动化的多级图像阈值分割方法，适用于不同类型的图像，但图像质量指标略低于人工设定阈值的传统方法。

Abstract: Multilevel Image thresholding is an important preprocessing algorithm in computer vision applications nowadays. Since most common thresholding methods take the desired count of thresholds as input by the user, thresholding methods that automatically determines a suitable count of thresholds from the input image itself are advantageous. In this article, a novel thresholding method based on a dynamic programming algorithm and a modification of Minimum Error Thresholding (MET) criterion is thoroughly presented. An empirical statistical study is performed to pinpoint why this proposed method is superior. Moreover, an extended comparison between this proposed method and other state-of-the-art methods is performed on a comprehensive set of natural, satellite and medical test images. The numerical results show that the proposed MET-DP method takes much less time than traditional dynamic programming thresholding methods when the number of thresholds is high. The proposed method can detect a suitable count of thresholds for most of tested images of different types. However, traditional methods that take the count of thresholds as input produce thresholded images of higher structural similarity index measure (SSIM) and peak signal-to-noise ratio (PSNR) values than MET-DP. Source code can be found on https://w3id.org/met-dp/article1-code

</details>


### [114] [Gemini Embedding 2: A Native Multimodal Embedding Model from Gemini](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27295)
*Madhuri Shanbhogue,Zhe Li,Shanfeng Zhang,Gustavo Hernández Ábrego,Shih-Cheng Huang,Aashi Jain,Daniel Salz,Sonam Goenka,Chaitra Hegde,Ji Ma,Feiyang Chen,Jiaxing Wu,Tanmaya Dabral,Babak Samari,Kevin Poulet,Daniel Cer,Kaifeng Chen,Paul Suganathan,Hui Hui,Jovan Andonov,Philippe Schlattner,Jay Han,Iftekhar Naim,Wing Lowe,Vladimir Pchelin,Albert Yang,Yi-Ting Chen,Zhongli Ding,Grace Zhang,Georg Heigold,Yichang Chen,Antoine Reveillon,Brendan Mccloskey,Wenlei Zhou,Dahun Kim,Rui Meng,Emma Wang,Jack Zheng,Halley Fede,Zhen Yang,Keegan Mosley,Brian Potetz,Sahil Dua,Henrique Schechter Vera,Shen Gao,Hesen Zhang,Andreas Hess,Hengxuan Ying,Alberto Montes,Karan Gill,Min Choi,Sebastian Russo,Anja Hauth,Jinhyuk Lee,Michael Boratko,Megan Barnes,Vikram Rao,Claudiu Musat,Cyril Allauzen,Ehsan Variani,Shankar Kumar,Tom Bagby,Junyi Jiao,Yang Gu,Tengxin Li,Ayush Agrawal,Roberto Santana,Dev Nath,Stephen Karukas,Shuoxuan Han,Lucia Loher,Alice Twu,Nidhi Vyas,Siddharth Bhai,Frank Palma Gomez,Wangyuan Zhang,Chaoren Liu,Jizheng Yang,Steve Qiu,Shijie Zhang,Sujay Kulkarni,Sascha Rothe,Sean Nakamoto,Raphael Hoffmann,Zach Gleicher,Yunhsuan Sung,Qin Yin,Tom Duerig,Mojtaba Seyedhosseini*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: Gemini Embedding 2 是一个原生多模态嵌入模型，支持视频、音频、图像和文本的统一嵌入表示，在多种检索任务中达到 SOTA 性能，并具备强零样本跨领域泛化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 构建一个能统一处理多种模态（视频、音频、图像、文本）并具有良好泛化能力的嵌入模型，以替代针对不同模态或任务定制的专用嵌入模型。

Method: 基于 Gemini 的多模态能力，采用大规模对比学习与多任务、多阶段训练策略，实现任意交错多模态输入的联合嵌入。

Result: 在 MSCOCO（R@1=62.9）、Vatex（NDCG@10=68.8）、MTEB 多语言（69.9）和 MTEB Code（84.0）等基准上超越专用模型；展现出跨天文、生物、艺术、烹饪等领域的强零样本性能。

Conclusion: Gemini Embedding 2 提供了统一、鲁棒且开箱即用的多模态嵌入能力，适用于 RAG、推荐、搜索等下游任务，并有望成为通用多模态表征基础设施。

Abstract: We introduce Gemini Embedding 2, a native multimodal embedding model that allows embedding video, audio, image, and text modalities in a unified representation space. We leverage the multimodal capabilities of Gemini to produce embeddings for arbitrary combinations of interleaved inputs across all these modalities that generalize well across a wide variety of tasks. Applying large-scale contrastive learning in a multi-task multi-stage training setup, we achieve state-of-the-art performance on key embedding benchmarks including unimodal, cross-modal, and multimodal retrieval spanning a diverse set of tasks. We show that our embedding model demonstrates strong performance (with a score of 62.9 R@1 on MSCOCO, 68.8 NDCG@10 on Vatex, 69.9 on MTEB multilingual and 84.0 on MTEB Code) across a variety of tasks surpassing the performance of specialized models. These unified capabilities make Gemini Embedding 2 a promising candidate for downstream use cases such as RAG, recommendation and search. Furthermore, its robust zero-shot performance across distinct fields - from astronomy and bioscience to fine arts and the culinary arts - establishes it as a highly reliable, out-of-the-box representation even for specialized domains.

</details>


### [115] [PlayClass: Automated Play Behaviour Classification in Poultry](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27304)
*Prince Ravi Leow,Neil Scheidwasser,Rebecca Oscarsson,Per Jensen,Samir Bhatt,David Alejandro Duchêne*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出PlayClass管道，用于从俯视禽舍视频中自动分类家禽的玩耍行为，结合长时跟踪与多模态特征提取，在挑战性数据集上达到77.0宏F1分数。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有动物福利自动化监测主要关注负面指标，而积极福利行为（如玩耍）缺乏系统研究。

Method: 提出PlayClass管道：利用YOLO引导的SAM 3进行长时目标跟踪以减少ID错误；融合手工运动特征与冻结的图像/视频基础模型（如V-JEPA 2.1）嵌入进行动作分类。

Result: V-JEPA 2.1结合手工特征在所有骨干网络中表现最优，宏F1达77.0；但因玩耍子类与非玩耍行为运动特征相似及鸟类间遮挡，任务仍具挑战性。

Conclusion: 本工作为家禽玩耍行为的自动化识别提供了可行框架，是积极动物福利监测的重要进展。

Abstract: Automated monitoring of animal welfare has largely targeted negative indicators, leaving positive welfare behaviours such as play underexplored. To address this gap, we present PlayClass, a pipeline for play-behaviour classification in poultry from top-down pen video. The pipeline leverages long-duration tracking with SAM 3 via YOLO-guided chunk boundaries to minimise identity errors in point-based prompting, and frozen embeddings from image and video foundation models for play action classification. Although handcrafted motion features from tracked masks alone achieved competitive accuracy, V-JEPA 2.1 consistently outperformed all other backbones across model scales, reaching 77.0 macro-averaged F$_1$ when combined with handcrafted features. Despite this result, the dataset remains challenging due to play sub-types sharing similar kinematic profiles with non-play and inter-bird occlusion. Overall, our work provides encouraging evidence towards automated frameworks for play behaviour classification in poultry.

</details>


### [116] [How and What to Imagine? Visual Thinking in Unified Multimodal Models for Cross-View Spatial Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27310)
*Qian Yang,Ankur Sikarwar,Huy Le,Le Zhang,Zhuan Shi,Perouz Taslakian,Aishwarya Agrawal*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出View Dropout（VDrop）训练策略，促使统一多模态模型（UMMs）在跨视角空间推理中真正利用生成的中间思考图像（而非忽略它），并系统比较了三种思考图像类型（自顶向下、全景、点匹配渲染），发现全景视觉思考结合VDrop在信息量与可学习性间取得最佳平衡，显著提升域外泛化性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视觉语言模型在跨视角空间推理中表现不佳，常忽略中间思考图像中的视觉证据；本文旨在探究如何使视觉思考真正起作用，以及何种类型的视觉思考最有效。

Method: 提出训练时干预方法View Dropout（VDrop），在答案预测阶段遮蔽部分输入视图但保留其对思考图像token的可见性，以强制模型依赖思考图像作答；并在统一多模态模型（UMMs）框架下，对比评估三种思考图像生成方式（top-down、panoramic、point-matching rendering）在可学习性与信息量间的权衡。

Result: 在合成数据上训练、五个真实世界域外基准上评测，仅全景视觉思考配合VDrop同时满足高信息量与高可学习性，并取得最优域外泛化性能。

Conclusion: 视觉思考的有效性不仅取决于其几何表达能力，更依赖于训练机制是否能强制模型将其用于推理；全景渲染思考图像与VDrop协同是提升跨视角空间推理鲁棒性的关键方案。

Abstract: Cross-view spatial reasoning remains a weak spot for vision-language models (VLMs): they often reason in language and lose the fine-grained geometry needed for the task. Thinking with images aims to address this by generating an intermediate thinking image, but recent work shows that models often ignore the visual evidence in these traces. We therefore ask how to make visual thinking matter, and what kind of visual thinking works best. We study these questions in unified multimodal models (UMMs), which natively support interleaved image-text generation. For the first question, we propose View Dropout (VDrop), a training-time intervention that hides parts of one input view from the answer span while keeping them visible to the thinking-image tokens. This encourages the model to use the thinking image when answering, instead of relying only on the input views. Once the thinking image is used for answer prediction, we study which type of visual thinking is most effective. We frame this as a learnability-informativeness tradeoff and compare three thinking-image variants: top-down, panoramic, and point-matching renderings. Trained on synthetic scenes and evaluated on five real-world out-of-domain benchmarks, panoramic visual thinking with VDrop is the only configuration that is both informative and learnable, and it achieves the best out-of-domain generalization.

</details>


### [117] [Q-GeoMem: Question-Guided Geometric Memory for Video Spatial Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27318)
*Xianqiang Gao,Qizhi Chen,Delin Qu,Haoming Song,Zhigang Wang,Bin Zhao,Dong Wang,Xuelong Li*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为\ours的问答引导式几何记忆框架，用于视频空间推理，通过注入相机条件几何信息、构建细粒度上下文库和语义-几何证据库，并设计基于问题相关性和新颖性的证据评分与容量限制更新机制，显著提升了长时序空间推理性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视频空间推理模型将记忆视为通用时间缓存，易引入冗余或无关几何信息，削弱长程推理能力。

Method: 提出\ours框架：1）将相机条件几何信息注入视觉token；2）构建两个互补记忆库——细粒度上下文库（存近期密集特征与相机状态）和语义-几何证据库（存紧凑长程证据）；3）基于Q-Former计算候选帧的问题相关性与相对于证据库的新颖性得分，并采用容量约束的替换策略维护证据库；4）推理时联合读取并自适应融合两库与当前帧表征。

Result: 在VSI-Bench和VSTI-Bench上达到当前最优性能；消融实验证实了所提证据评分机制的有效性。

Conclusion: 问答引导的几何记忆机制能有效提升视频空间推理中长时序、 viewpoint-dependent 的几何信息建模与利用能力，为视频语言理解中的空间推理提供了新范式。

Abstract: Video spatial reasoning requires accumulating viewpoint-dependent evidence over time while retaining information useful to the question being asked. Existing spatial video-language models improve geometric perception and long-range context modeling, but often treat memory as a generic temporal cache, which can introduce redundant or irrelevant geometry and weaken long-horizon reasoning. We propose \textbf{\ours}, a question-guided geometric memory framework for video spatial reasoning. \ours injects camera-conditioned geometry into visual tokens and maintains two complementary memories: a Fine-Grained Context Bank for recent dense features and camera states, and a Semantic-Geometric Evidence Bank for compact long-range evidence. Each candidate frame is scored by the product of Q-Former-based question relevance and novelty with respect to the retained bank; this score is stored and reused during reading, while a capacity-based replacement rule keeps the bank compact. During reasoning, both memories are read before update and adaptively fused with the current frame representation. Experiments on VSI-Bench and VSTI-Bench show that \ours achieves state-of-the-art performance among evaluated spatial reasoning models, validating the effectiveness of question-guided geometric memory. Ablations further verify the contribution of the proposed evidence scoring mechanism.

</details>


### [118] [PARE: Pruning and Adaptive Routing for Efficient Video Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27336)
*Yutong Wang,Yunke Wang,Tianfan Xue,Yu Qiao,Yaohui Wang,Xinyuan Chen,Chang Xu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出PARE方法，通过结构感知剪枝和输入自适应路由联合压缩视频扩散Transformer的宽度和深度，实现高效视频生成。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视频扩散模型计算开销大，且固定架构无法适应不同输入或去噪阶段，亟需动态、自适应的轻量化方案。

Method: PARE包含两部分：1）基于注意力头时空角色区分的重要性评分机制进行宽度剪枝；2）基于去噪步数和视觉内容训练轻量级路由器实现深度动态路由；并采用分阶段蒸馏优化策略解耦学习目标。

Result: 在Wan2.1-14B数据集上，PARE显著降低单步计算量，同时在VBench各项指标上保持生成质量，并可与步数蒸馏协同进一步加速。

Conclusion: PARE通过宽度与深度的联合自适应压缩，在不牺牲视频生成质量的前提下，有效提升视频扩散模型的推理效率，为高效视频生成提供了新范式。

Abstract: Video Diffusion Transformers (DiTs) generate high-quality videos but demand substantial compute due to wide blocks, deep architectures, and iterative sampling. Recent methods reduce cost by compressing width, depth, or sampling steps, but typically commit to a fixed architecture that cannot adapt to individual inputs or denoising stages. We propose PARE (Pruning and Adaptive Routing for Efficient video generation), which jointly compresses width and depth with structure-aware pruning and input-adaptive routing. For width, we observe that attention heads specialize into spatial and temporal roles, and design importance scoring that accounts for this distinction to prevent motion-critical temporal heads from being pruned prematurely. For depth, we train a lightweight router conditioned on denoising timestep and visual content to dynamically select which blocks to execute at each step, enabling per-input compute adaptation rather than static block removal. A progressive pipeline first recovers width-pruned quality via distillation, then jointly optimizes the student and router to decouple the two learning objectives. Experiments on Wan2.1-14B for both image-to-video and text-to-video generation show that PARE substantially reduces per-step computation while preserving quality across VBench dimensions, and composes with step distillation for further acceleration.

</details>


### [119] [Towards Controllable Image Generation through Representation-Conditioned Diffusion Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27343)
*Nithesh Chandher Karthikeyan,Jonas Unger,Gabriel Eilertsen*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于自监督预训练模型表征来条件化扩散模型的新方法，无需大量标注数据，提升了无条件图像生成质量，并实现了对生成过程的可控性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统扩散模型依赖大量标注数据（如文本提示或语义图）进行条件控制，成本高且泛化受限；本文旨在探索更高效、无需额外标注的条件化方式。

Method: 利用预训练自监督模型提取图像表征，将其作为扩散模型的条件输入；在该表征空间中识别变化方向，实现生成控制。

Result: 该自条件机制不仅提升了无条件图像生成质量，还展现出良好的平滑性和解耦性，验证了其作为可控生成空间的有效性。

Conclusion: 基于自监督表征的条件化是一种有前景的扩散模型控制范式，为减少对标注数据的依赖和提升生成可控性提供了新思路。

Abstract: Diffusion models have emerged as powerful tools for high-quality image generation and editing, but guiding these models to produce specific outputs remains a challenge. Conventional approaches rely on conditioning mechanisms, such as text prompts or semantic maps, which require extensively annotated datasets. In this preliminary work, we explore diffusion models conditioned on representations from a pre-trained self-supervised model. The self-conditioning mechanism not only improves the quality of unconditional image generation, but also provides a representation space that can be used to control the generation. We explore this conditioning space by identifying directions of variations, and demonstrate promising properties in terms of smoothness and disentanglement.

</details>


### [120] [When Eyes Betray AI: Social Gaze Consistency as a Semantic Cue for AI-Generated Image Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27348)
*Kim Jihyeon,Sohee Kim,Soosan Lee,Souhwan Jung,James Matthew Rehg,Hyesong Choi*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种新的高阶语义线索——社交凝视一致性（Social Gaze Consistency），用于检测图像生成伪造，尤其在人物交互场景中；通过构建诊断数据集、块式组合描述监督和跨架构验证，证明该线索独立于低层伪影且具有模型无关性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有生成模型已大幅削弱低层伪造痕迹（如像素指纹、频域异常等），尤其在人物局部编辑场景下难以检测；亟需挖掘高阶、语义层面的伪造线索。

Method: 提出社交凝视一致性作为新检测维度，并设计三项核心技术：(i) 带区域扰动与严格配对的诊断数据集；(ii) 块式组合描述监督（固定5块推理骨架）；(iii) 跨视觉-语言（FakeVLM）与纯视觉（Effort）主干的联合验证；并给出四步机制解释泛化性。

Result: 在COCOAI Interaction子集上FakeVLM准确率提升3.7个百分点（67.8→71.5），Person子集提升1.3个百分点（83.0→84.3）；真实/伪造类召回率同步上升，证实非偏差性检测；且在多生成器套件上展现良好迁移能力。

Conclusion: 社交凝视一致性是一种正交于低层特征的、骨干无关的高阶伪造线索，为深度伪造检测提供了新范式，尤其适用于人像交互等细粒度语义伪造场景。

Abstract: Recent generative models have largely closed the gap on low-level artifacts - pixel fingerprints, frequency anomalies, upsampling traces - particularly in person-centric and partial-edit settings where the manipulated region is small and surrounded by photometrically authentic content. We introduce Social Gaze Consistency, a high-level semantic cue defined as the mutual coherence of gaze direction, head-eye alignment, and pupil placement between interacting individuals, and show that it constitutes a previously underutilized detection axis orthogonal to existing low-level paradigms. We instantiate this insight through three coupled mechanisms: (i) a controlled diagnostic dataset with region-specific perturbations of gaze-consistent imagery, where strict pair-level grouping forecloses generator-fingerprint memorization as an optimization-time shortcut rather than relying on augmentation; (ii) Block-Compositional Caption Supervision, which holds a single 5-block reasoning skeleton invariant across 1,250 macro-combined captions, decoupling reasoning consistency from surface diversity; (iii) Cross-architecture validation showing the same supervision improves a vision-language backbone (FakeVLM) by +3.7 pp on the COCOAI Interaction subset (balanced accuracy 67.8 -> 71.5) and +1.3 pp on the COCOAI Person subset (83.0 -> 84.3), with consistent gains on a vision-only backbone (Effort), evidencing a backbone-agnostic cue. Real- and fake-class recalls rise simultaneously, ruling out a "predict-all-fake" artifact. A four-step mechanistic account - paired-edit shortcut blocking, hard-to-easy difficulty transfer, CLIP prior preservation, and diffusion-family shared spectral weakness in periocular structure - explains why training on a single inpainter (FLUX.1-Fill) transfers to multi-generator suites. We will release the code upon acceptance to facilitate reproducibility.

</details>


### [121] [Feedforward 3D Editing Learns from Semantic-Part Transformation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27351)
*Jiawei Weng,Saining Zhang,Zhenxin Diao,Peishuo Li,Henghaofan Zhang,Junhao Chen,Hao Zhao*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出Pxform数据集和PartFlow网络，通过语义部件级变换实现可扩展的前馈式3D编辑，显著提升编辑保真度与源模型保持能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有3D编辑缺乏高质量配对监督，导致编辑定位不准、结构保持弱、边界模糊及语义不一致等问题。

Method: 构建基于语义3D部件变换的Pxform大规模配对数据集（10万+样本），并设计PartFlow前馈网络，引入源感知隐空间控制、掩码感知速度保持与渲染空间一致性监督。

Result: PartFlow在几何与外观编辑基准上达到SOTA性能，且推理时无需3D编辑掩码。

Conclusion: 语义部件级监督是提升可扩展前馈式3D编辑质量的关键，Pxform与PartFlow为该方向提供了新范式与实用工具。

Abstract: 3D editing is a fundamental capability for scalable 3D content creation. While image editing has rapidly evolved toward large-scale feedforward generative paradigms, 3D AI generation remains dominated by training-free editing pipelines. A central challenge of feedforward 3D editing lies in the lack of high-quality paired supervision. Editable 3D assets require simultaneous preservation of geometry, multi-view consistency, structural coherence, and localized edit controllability. Existing 3D editing datasets often rely on independently generated assets, image-mediated reconstruction or narrow edit taxonomies, leading to inaccurate localization, weak preservation, blurred edit boundaries, and limited semantic consistency. In this work, we introduce a new perspective: scalable feedforward 3D editing should be learned from semantic-part transformations. Based on this insight, we propose Pxform, a high-quality 3D editing dataset with over 100K consistent before/after editing pairs across seven edit types. Instead of treating objects as unstructured shapes, our pipeline grounds edits directly in semantic 3D parts. Built upon Pxform, we further propose PartFlow, a feedforward 3D editing network that injects source-aware latent control into pretrained 3D generative priors. PartFlow introduces mask-aware velocity preservation and render-space consistency supervision to jointly improve edit fidelity and source preservation, while requiring no 3D edit mask during inference. Extensive experiments demonstrate that high-quality semantic-part supervision substantially improves scalable 3D editing, enabling PartFlow to achieve state-of-the-art performance on both geometric and appearance editing benchmarks.

</details>


### [122] [SpatialBench: Is Your Spatial Foundation Model an All-Round Player?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27367)
*Haosong Peng,Hao Li,Jiaqi Chen,Yuhao Pan,Runmao Yao,Yalun Dai,Fushuo Huo,Fangzhou Hong,Zhaoxi Chen,Haozhao Wang,Dingwen Zhang,Ziwei Liu,Wenchao Xu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了SpatialBench，一个跨范式、多领域、确定性采样的大规模空间基础模型基准，用于全面评估模型在不同任务、视角、场景域、输入密度和硬件约束下的泛化能力；实验发现当前模型尚不具备真正通用性，并揭示了全上下文注意力与内存受限策略的权衡、领域对齐与数据质量的重要性；同时发布了新数据集DA-Next-5M和基线模型DA-Next。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有空间基础模型评估局限于特定领域和窄范式，缺乏对真实泛化能力（如跨任务、跨视角、跨域、不同输入密度及硬件约束）的系统性检验，亟需一个更全面、严谨、可复现的基准。

Method: 构建SpatialBench基准：涵盖19个数据集、546个场景、5个空间领域；支持6种建模范式、5类任务套件、4种输入密度设置；采用确定性采样；并进一步提出DA-Next-5M数据集与DA-Next模型作为补充。

Result: 实证表明当前模型并非‘全能选手’；全上下文注意力提升精度，而内存受限策略保障长序列扩展性；在具身与第一人称任务中，领域对齐和数据质量比单纯扩大数据规模更重要；DA-Next在多项任务上展现出强基线性能。

Conclusion: SpatialBench填补了空间基础模型系统性评估的空白，揭示了关键设计权衡与发展瓶颈；强调需兼顾架构效率、数据质量与领域适配性；DA-Next系列为后续研究提供了高质量数据与模型基础。

Abstract: While spatial foundation models have demonstrated impressive performance on standard datasets, a critical question remains: are they truly all-round players capable of generalizing robustly across diverse downstream tasks, arbitrary viewpoints, shifting scene domains, varying input densities, and specific hardware constraints? Answering this overarching question requires a holistic assessment, yet current models are mainly evaluated on specific domains for which they were specifically designed or trained. Such evaluations are intrinsically limited by narrow paradigm coverage, limited scene domains, and arbitrary frame sampling, making it fundamentally difficult to assess their true generalization capabilities. To address this gap, we present SpatialBench, a cross-paradigm, domain-diverse benchmark for spatial foundation models with deterministic sampling. SpatialBench features unprecedented scale and rigorous deterministic design, comprising 19 datasets and 546 scenes across 5 diverse spatial domains. It comprehensively evaluates 41 models across 6 paradigms on 5 task suites under 4 different input density settings. Our extensive evaluation reveals that current models are not yet all-round players, and uncovers crucial insights for future advancement. Specifically, we demonstrate that full-context attention maximizes accuracy while bounded-memory strategies unlock long-sequence scalability. Moreover, our empirical evaluations in challenging embodied and egocentric tasks demonstrate that strict domain alignment and high data quality are far more critical to performance than simple dataset scaling. Furthermore, to address the largest data gap identified in our analysis, we go beyond evaluation by introducing a large-scale dataset, DA-Next-5M, and a strong baseline model, DA-Next, pushing the boundaries of spatial representation learning.

</details>


### [123] [G3T Up! Gravity Aligned Coordinate Frames Simplify Pointmap Processing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27372)
*Bharath Raj Nagoor Kani,Noah Snavely*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于重力对齐坐标系的3D重建方法G3T及其增量式扩展G3T-Long，以提升多视角点云配准与重建精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有前馈式3D重建方法（如VGGT）采用相机中心坐标系预测点图，但该坐标系在多视角间旋转自由度高、不利于配准；而真实场景中普遍存在重力方向等强结构先验，采用重力对齐的直立坐标系可统一垂直轴，降低跨视角几何关系建模难度。

Method: 提出Gravity Grounded Geometry Transformer（G3T），基于已有模型在重力对齐的3D数据上微调，输出直立点图和相机到重力的姿态；进一步设计G3T-Long，一种基于子图（submap）的增量式重建流程，利用直立坐标系减少旋转自由度来提升重建精度。

Result: G3T能生成高精度的重力感知预测（包括直立点图和相机-重力姿态）；G3T-Long在增量式3D重建任务中显著提升了重建精度。

Conclusion: 采用重力对齐坐标系替代传统相机中心坐标系是提升前馈式3D重建鲁棒性与精度的有效策略，G3T及G3T-Long为此提供了可行架构与实用流程。

Abstract: Modern feed-forward 3D reconstruction methods like VGGT predict pixel-aligned pointmaps in camera-centric coordinate frames. However, this choice of coordinate frame is not always optimal. We propose instead to predict pointmaps in upright, gravity-aligned frames that exploit strong structural cues present in many real-world scenes. Unlike camera-centric frames, gravity-aligned frames share a common vertical axis across viewpoints, reducing the rotational degrees of freedom needed to relate pointmaps to one another. To this end, we introduce the Gravity Grounded Geometry Transformer (G3T), fine-tuned from existing models on gravity-aligned 3D data. G3T produces highly accurate gravity-aware predictions, including upright pointmaps and camera-to-gravity poses. We further introduce G3T-Long, a submap-based incremental 3D reconstruction pipeline that leverages the reduced rotational degrees of freedom afforded by upright frames to achieve significantly improved reconstruction accuracy.

</details>


<div id='cs.CL'></div>

# cs.CL [[Back]](#toc)

### [124] [Self-Verified Distillation: Your Language Model Is Secretly Its Own Synthetic Data Pipeline](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.26132)
*Tony Lee,Percy Liang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为Self-Verified Distillation的后训练精炼方法，使大语言模型仅凭无标签种子问题即可自我提升：通过自生成、三级自验证（循环一致性、事实性、正确性）筛选答案，并用筛选后的数据微调模型，在数学、科学和编程三大推理领域均显著提升性能，且测试时仅需单次前向推理。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索大语言模型能否仅利用无标签提示、无需外部教师或工具反馈，实现自我改进。

Method: 提出Self-Verified Distillation：模型对无标签种子问题生成多个候选解，再经三阶段级联自验证（cycle-consistency、factuality、correctness），仅当所有验证器一致通过才保留该解，构建自整理数据集用于后续微调。

Result: 在Qwen3系列模型（0.6B/4B/8B）上验证，显著提升数学（+16.7）、科学（+11.1）、编程（+8.3）领域的held-out pass@1；效果优于仅靠测试时计算增益的UQ-TTC基线，且推理更高效（单次前向）。

Conclusion: 仅依赖无标签数据与自验证机制，LLMs可通过Self-Verified Distillation实现有效自我提升，为低成本、高效率的模型持续优化提供了新范式。

Abstract: Can post-trained large language models (LLMs) further improve themselves using only unlabeled prompts, without external teachers or feedback from tools? We study this setting starting only from unlabeled seed questions with no ground-truth solutions, across three reasoning domains: math, science, and coding. We propose Self-Verified Distillation, a simple post-training refinement algorithm in which the model generates candidate solutions to these seed questions, filters them using prompt-based self-verification, and trains on the resulting self-curated dataset. Inspired by the UQ benchmark's use of multiple validators to screen candidate answers to hard unsolved questions, we adapt this validation-based filtering idea to self-training: the model filters its own generated solutions through a three-stage cascade of cycle-consistency, factuality, and correctness checks, accepting a solution only if it passes all stages with unanimous judge votes. We find that sampling more candidate generations and using a larger verification budget during training data construction produces higher-quality self-curated data and, in turn, better reasoning models. We then train Qwen3 models at multiple scales with Self-Verified Distillation and obtain gains across all three domains. For Qwen3-4B, our method improves aggregate held-out pass@1 by +16.7 points in math (AIME26 and HMMT), +11.1 points in science (GPQA Diamond and HLE), and +8.3 points in coding (LCBv5 and LCBv6), with gains also extending to 0.6B and 8B models. Compared to our test-time-only baseline (UQ-TTC), which improves performance by spending extra compute at inference time, Self-Verified Distillation achieves better performance in most settings while requiring only a single inference call at test time.

</details>


### [125] [Pretraining Data Exposure in Large Language Models: A Survey of Membership Inference, Data Contamination, and Security Implications](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.26133)
*Ziyi Tong,Feifei Sun,Le Minh Nguyen*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文首次在Pretraining Data Exposure (PDE) 框架下统一综述数据污染与成员推断两大方向，形式化不同暴露层级，系统梳理攻击与防御方法，并总结实证发现与开放挑战。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着大语言模型规模和预训练数据增长，预训练数据暴露（PDE）问题日益突出，涉及评估完整性与隐私保护，但现有研究常将相关领域（数据污染、成员推断）孤立处理，缺乏统一框架。

Method: 提出PDE统一分析框架，形式化不同暴露层级，系统回顾并分类现有攻击与防御方法，综合实证结果，识别共性规律与差异。

Result: 明确了PDE的核心定义与多级暴露模型；归纳出主流攻击（如基于logit/loss的检测）与防御（如数据去重、差分隐私）策略的有效性边界；揭示了当前方法在泛化性、可扩展性与理论保障上的局限。

Conclusion: PDE是连接数据治理与模型安全的关键桥梁，需跨数据、算法与评估维度协同推进；未来应加强理论建模、真实场景验证及标准化基准建设。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have become the predominant paradigm in NLP, advancing both research and industry. As model sizes and pretraining data grow, concerns about Pretraining Data Exposure (PDE) increase due to the scale and opacity of training datasets.
  PDE refers to determining whether specific data appeared in an LLM's pretraining corpus. It is critical for ensuring evaluation integrity and protecting privacy, intersecting two key areas: data contamination and membership inference. Though conceptually related, these areas have often been studied in isolation. This paper offers the first unified survey of both under the PDE framework. We formalize PDE across exposure levels, review attack and defense methods, synthesize empirical findings, and highlight open challenges and future research directions.

</details>


### [126] [SPEAR: Code-Augmented Agentic Prompt Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.26275)
*Mengyin Lu,Cong Feng,Huimin Han,Guangming Lu,Yu Sun,Xiaonan Ding,Shihui Long,Fengyi Li,Tanvi Motwani*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出SPEAR，一种基于代码即行动范式的沙盒化主动回滚提示工程优化器，通过自主调用评估、Python执行、设置提示和完成等工具，结合自动回滚与守卫指标机制，在工业级LLM-as-judge任务中显著超越现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自动提示工程（APE）将优化器视为固定流水线，缺乏灵活性与自适应分析能力；尤其在复杂工业判别任务中，难以进行细粒度错误归因与结构化分析。

Method: 将CodeAct的'代码即动作'范式迁移到APE，构建SPEAR智能体：配备evaluate、python、set_prompt、finish四类工具；核心是可执行任意Python代码的沙盒环境，用于对评估数据集做混淆矩阵、错误聚类、分组指标等结构化分析；引入自动回滚（指标下降时撤销）与可选守卫指标下限两大机制保障单调提升。

Result: 在13个工业LLM-as-judge任务（涵盖招聘初筛、对话记忆、查询精炼）上全面领先：如工具选择任务κ达0.857（vs 0.359），过滤相关性F1-macro为0.815（vs 0.763），最难抽取维度κ为0.254（vs 0.218）；BBH-7平均准确率0.938（vs GEPA 0.628、TextGrad 0.484）；消融显示Python工具贡献最大（如移除导致κ下降约0.79）。

Conclusion: SPEAR证明了开放沙盒式编程能力对提示优化的关键价值，尤其在需结构化错误分析的复杂判别任务中不可替代；其守卫机制使长程智能体行为可控且单调改进，为工业级APE提供了新范式。

Abstract: Automatic prompt engineering (APE) rewrites prompts to improve downstream task performance, but existing APE loops treat the optimizer itself as a fixed pipeline. We port the code-as-action paradigm of CodeAct (Wang et al., 2024a) to APE and propose SPEAR (Sandboxed Prompt Engineer with Active Roll-back), a free-form agentic optimizer with four tools -- evaluate, python, set_prompt, finish -- that decides autonomously how and when to use them. The distinctive tool is the Python sandbox: the optimizer writes and executes arbitrary Python on the current evaluation DataFrame, performing structural error analysis (confusion matrices, error clustering, per group metrics) the agent itself authors. Two guardrails turn the long-horizon agent into a monotone-improving optimizer: auto-rollback on metric regression, and an optional guard metric floor. We evaluate on three industrial LLM-as-judge suites (13 judge tasks across recruiter-intake, conversational-memory, and query-refinement systems) plus seven BBH tasks and GSM8K. SPEAR wins every industrial task on the primary metric ($κ$ 0.857 vs 0.359 on tool-selection; F1-macro 0.815 vs 0.763 on filter-relevance; $κ$ 0.254 vs 0.218 on the hardest extraction dimension). On BBH-7 SPEAR averages 0.938 accuracy vs GEPA 0.628 and TextGrad 0.484. Ablations show the Python tool is the largest single lever on complex judge tasks ($Δ\approx +0.79κ$ on the 5-class tool-selection judge, $Δ\approx +0.35κ$ on the hardest extraction dimension when removed); its irreplaceable contribution is class-pair confusion aggregation that a long-context LLM cannot extract reliably from the raw eval DataFrame.

</details>


### [127] [CroCo: Cross-Lingual Contrastive Preference Tuning on Self-Generations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.26293)
*Mike Zhang,Ali Basirat,Desmond Elliott*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出跨语言对比偏好调优方法（CroCo），利用英文偏好训练的奖励模型在多语言自生成响应上进行对比学习，无需各语言特定偏好标注，显著提升多语言大模型在结构化任务和开放生成任务上的表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有工作表明，通过奖励分数控制大语言模型自生成响应间的对比性可提升英语下游偏好调优效果；但该方法尚未扩展至多语言场景，且依赖语言特定偏好标注，限制了其在低资源语言中的应用。

Method: 提出CroCo方法：基于多语言基础模型，仅用英文偏好数据训练奖励模型，在14种语言（含高低资源）的自生成响应上实施跨语言对比偏好调优；比较在线（on-policy）与离线（off-policy）数据策略，并在单语/多语设置下评估性能。

Result: CroCo在多数语言中无需语言特异性标注即可有效迁移；英文训练的奖励模型能给出可靠的跨语言响应排序；on-policy数据至关重要，off-policy数据削弱效果；在结构化任务中，EuroLLM-9B在7种语言中6种超越基线，Aya-3B在7种中4种超越；开放生成任务中，两模型均在11种语言中全面优于基线。

Conclusion: CroCo为多语言偏好调优提供了高效、低标注依赖的新范式，验证了跨语言对比学习的有效性，尤其适用于低资源语言场景，是迈向真正多语言对齐的重要一步。

Abstract: Prior work establishes that controlled contrastiveness between self-generated responses from large language models, set via reward scores, improves downstream preference tuning in English. We extend this method to multiple languages and evaluate two models across a total of 14 high and low-resource languages on a diverse set of tasks. Our central finding is that cross-lingual contrastive preference tuning on self-generations (CroCo) transfers without language-specific preference annotation. A reward model trained on English preferences (atop a multilingual base) produces useful within-language rankings across most languages, and pairing in either a monolingual or multilingual setting improves over each model on the majority of setups while preventing the catastrophic forgetting of supervised fine-tuning. We observe that the gains require on-policy data. Off-policy responses reduce the benefit and online preference optimization fails to improve over the offline variant. Specifically, on structured tasks, our method matches or exceeds the base in 6/7 languages for EuroLLM-9B and 4/7 settings for Aya-3B. On open-ended generation, both tuned models win against their respective base across 11 evaluated languages. Overall, we show promising directions for multilingual preference tuning.

</details>


### [128] [The Daily Dose: Workflow-Integrated Large Language Model Automation for Clinical Summarization and Trial Identification in Radiation Oncology](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.26346)
*Jason Holmes,Federico Mastroleo,Mariana Borras-Osorio,Srinivas Seetamsetty,Satomi Shiraishi,Mirek Fatyga,Judy C. Boughey,Cornelius A. Thiels,William G. Breen,Daniel J. Ma,Daniel K. Ebner,David M. Routman,Brady S. Laughlin,Carlos E. Vargas,Samir H. Patel,Sujay A. Vora,Nadia N. Laack,Andrew Y. K. Foong,Wei Liu,Mark R. Waddle*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文介绍了一种名为The Daily Dose（TDD）的LLM驱动临床摘要与临床试验匹配系统，并在放疗科实践中进行了初步评估，结果显示其具有良好的可用性、满意度和工作流改善效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 提升放疗科医生日常临床工作中病历摘要生成与临床试验匹配的效率与准确性，减轻人工负担。

Method: 采用混合方法设计，对部署TDD系统一个月后的临床医生开展横断面匿名问卷调查；系统每日通过RadOnc-GPT自动生成个性化邮件摘要，含患者日程、EHR提取的病情简述及匹配的临床试验信息。

Result: 55名受访者中94.5%为放疗科人员，69.1%为主治医师；83.6%高频使用TDD；可用性/满意度均值3.89（SD=1.04），实用性均值3.43（SD=1.24），工作流影响与持续使用意愿均值3.80（SD=1.17）；27%用户估计每日节省≥10分钟；量表信度Cronbach's α=0.97。

Conclusion: TDD系统在真实临床环境中展现出高接受度与实用性，具备进一步推广潜力，但时间节省效果存在个体差异，需后续验证其对临床决策质量的影响。

Abstract: Objective: To describe the design and early clinical evaluation of The Daily Dose (TDD), an LLM-driven, automated clinical summarization and clinical-trial identification system integrated into routine radiation oncology practice. Design: Mixed-methods evaluation using a cross-sectional, anonymous clinician survey administered after 1 month of system deployment. Exposure: Daily automated delivery of physician-specific email summaries generated using RadOnc-GPT, including patient schedules, concise EHR-derived clinical-status summaries, and automated identification of potentially relevant clinical trials for new or consult visits. Main Outcomes and Measures: Primary outcomes included self-reported usability, satisfaction, perceived usefulness, perceived impact on workflow, time savings, and intention for continued use. Internal consistency reliability was assessed using Cronbach's $α$. Results: Among 55 respondents, 52 (94.5\%) worked in radiation oncology, and 38 (69.1\%) were attending physicians. Most participants (83.6\%) reported using TDD daily or several times per week. Mean (SD) scores were 3.89 (1.04) for usability and satisfaction, 3.43 (1.24) for perceived usefulness, and 3.80 (1.17) for impact and future use (5-point Likert scale). Overall satisfaction was positively associated with perceived time savings ($p < .001$). Participants reported variable time savings, with 27\% estimating $\geq 10$ minutes saved per day. The questionnaire demonstrated excellent internal consistency (overall Cronbach's $α$ = 0.97).

</details>


### [129] [RICE-PO: Turning Retrieval Interactions into Credit Signals for Reasoning Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.26352)
*Mingchen Li,Hansi Zeng,Zhuo Qian,Jiatan Huang,Hamed Zamani,Hong Yu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出RICE-PO框架，通过将检索交互转化为局部学习信号，解决语言代理在迭代检索中对不可观测推理步骤的信用分配难题，在多个基准上优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统检索代理训练中，可执行动作（如查询）可直接评估，但隐含推理步骤不可观测且仅间接影响后续动作，导致基于最终结果的奖励分配不可靠。

Method: RICE-PO选取高不确定性可执行动作为锚点，利用检索指标评估局部反事实分支，并仅在推理到动作影响强且未来残差效应稳定时，将信用传播至隐含推理步骤。

Result: 在BRIGHT和BEIR基准上，RICE-PO持续优于基于提示的代理和基于组的强化学习基线，且使用相同检索器设置。

Conclusion: 代理与环境交互的结构本身即可为基于推理的检索代理训练提供有效监督信号。

Abstract: Retrieval is increasingly moving from one-shot matching toward interactive reasoning, where language agents iteratively inspect evidence, reformulate queries, and search again. Training such agents raises a credit-assignment challenge: executable actions such as queries or summaries can be directly evaluated by the retriever, while latent reasoning steps are not directly observable and only affect future executable actions. This asymmetry makes outcome-level reward assignment unreliable, as the same final reward may credit reasoning steps that did not actually shape retrieval success. We propose RICE-PO, a critic-free policy optimization framework that converts retrieval interactions into localized learning signals. RICE-PO selects high-uncertainty executable actions as anchors, evaluates local counterfactual branches using retrieval metrics, and propagates credit to latent reasoning steps only when reasoning-to-action influence is strong and future residual effects are stable. On BRIGHT and BEIR, RICE-PO consistently outperforms prompt-based agents and group-based RL baselines under the same retriever setting. These results show that the structure of agent-environment interaction itself can provide useful supervision for training reasoning-based retrieval agents.

</details>


### [130] [In-Context Optimization for Retrieval-Augmented Generation: A Gradient-Descent Perspective](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.26356)
*Mingchen Li,Jiatan Huang,Chuxu Zhang,Liang Zhao,Hong Yu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文将检索增强生成（RAG）建模为上下文内优化过程，揭示其与隐式梯度下降的内在联系，并据此提出一种轻量级、前向更新方法，在不修改冻结大模型和检索器的前提下提升RAG性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有RAG方法将检索文档视为静态证据，未充分利用其作为自适应信号的潜力；而上下文学习已被发现与隐式梯度下降相关，启发作者探索RAG是否也可被理解为一种上下文内优化过程。

Method: 理论层面：证明单层线性自注意力可精确实现统一的线性化RAG目标函数上的一次梯度下降步，涵盖投影式和点积式两种检索接口；实践层面：基于该洞见设计一种仅需前向传播的轻量级上下文条件更新机制，用于动态调整生成器对证据的使用方式。

Result: 该方法在7个问答基准、2种检索器和2种冻结大模型上均优于共享接口基线，具备跨任务迁移能力，且性能接近测试时梯度适配，但计算开销显著更低。

Conclusion: RAG本质上可被形式化为一种上下文内优化，该视角不仅提供了理论统一性，更催生出高效实用的改进方法，弥合理论洞察与工程落地之间的鸿沟。

Abstract: In-context learning has recently been linked to implicit gradient descent in linear self-attention models, suggesting that context can induce a forward-pass update. Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) also relies on context, but retrieved documents are usually treated as static evidence rather than signals for adaptation. We study RAG as an in-context optimization process. First, we show that one linear self-attention layer can implement one gradient-descent step on a unified linearized RAG objective covering both projection-based and dot-product retrieval interfaces. This gives an exact regime where retrieval-augmented prediction and in-context optimization coincide. We use this result not as a literal model of LLM computation, but as a guide for adapting the interaction between queries and retrieved evidence. We then test the boundary of this correspondence: it remains stable under controlled linear extensions, but becomes feature-distribution dependent under nonlinear architectures. Finally, we turn this view into a lightweight method for frozen RAG LLMs. The method keeps the retriever and backbone fixed, and predicts a context-conditioned update to a generator-side evidence-use interface. Across seven QA benchmarks, two retrievers, and two frozen LLM backbones, this forward-only update improves a shared-interface baseline, transfers to held-out tasks, and approaches test-time gradient adaptation at much lower per-query cost.

</details>


### [131] [Why LLMs Hallucinate on Structured Knowledge: A Mechanistic Analysis of Reasoning over Linearized Representations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.26362)
*Shanghao Li,Jinda Han,Yibo Wang,Yuanjie Zhu,Zihe Song,Langzhou He,Kenan Kamel A Alghythee,Philip S. Yu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文研究了大语言模型（LLM）在利用结构化外部知识（如图、表格）进行推理时产生幻觉的内在机制，发现幻觉源于注意力偏向捷径式结构线索以及前馈层语义接地失败，而非随机噪声，并验证该机制在多跳图和表格场景中具有泛化性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管大语言模型（LLMs）可访问充足结构化外部知识（如图、表），仍常产生幻觉输出，其根本机制尚不清晰，亟需深入理解。

Method: 通过分析LLM在结构化知识（图、表）推理任务中的内部动态，重点考察注意力分布模式与前馈层表征的语义接地能力，识别幻觉产生的系统性机制，并在单跳、多跳图及表格设置中验证其泛化性。

Result: 发现幻觉源于两个系统性内部机制：（1）注意力过度集中于捷径式结构线索，而非全上下文；（2）前馈层表征未能有效接地外部知识，导致依赖参数化记忆；且语义接地失败比注意力偏差更具一致性，该模式在多跳与表格任务中均成立。

Conclusion: LLM对结构化知识的幻觉并非随机错误，而是由可识别、可泛化的内部机制（注意力偏差与前馈接地失败）驱动，为检测与缓解幻觉提供了新路径。

Abstract: In many reasoning tasks, large language models (LLMs) rely on structured external knowledge, such as graphs and tables, which is typically linearized into sequential token representations. However, even when sufficient knowledge is available, LLMs can still produce hallucinated outputs, and the underlying mechanisms behind such failures remain poorly understood. We investigate these mechanisms and find that hallucinations arise from systematic internal dynamics rather than random noise. First, attention disproportionately concentrates toward shortcut-like structural cues rather than distributing across the full context. Second, feed-forward representations fail to ground the provided knowledge, causing the model to revert to parametric memory. Moreover, our results indicate that hallucination is consistently associated with failures in semantic grounding within feed-forward layers, while attention allocation exhibits greater task-dependent variability. Finally, we show that these mechanistic patterns generalize beyond single-hop graphs to multi-hop and tabular settings, enabling effective hallucination detection across structured knowledge formats.

</details>


### [132] [Cultural Value Alignment Via Latent Activation Steering in Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.26365)
*Trung Duc Anh Dang,Sarah Masud*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于情境化行为探测和激活引导的文化评估与干预框架，用于揭示和调整大语言模型（LLMs）中隐含的文化价值观，发现其文化维度存在内在耦合，难以独立精准对齐。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM常表现出同质化的文化视角，传统基于世界价值观调查（WVS）的直接提示无法有效挖掘模型深层文化表征，易导致安全拒绝或中性回答。

Method: 采用300个情境化道德困境提取隐式token概率以映射文化价值潜空间，并引入前向传播中的激活引导（activation steering）技术进行无需微调的文化干预。

Result: 在多个LLM上验证了文化适应性差异；发现‘潜在线性耦合’现象——沿一个文化维度干预会引发另一维度的意外偏移；表明文化价值以耦合结构编码。

Conclusion: 文化价值观在LLM中并非正交独立，而是结构性耦合的，因此需更精细的计算框架来实现全球多元价值的可控对齐。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) often exhibit homogenized cultural perspectives. While the World Values Survey (WVS) provides a gold standard for mapping human values, traditional direct prompting of LLMs on WVS often fails to access the model's latent cultural depth, leading to safety-aligned refusals or neutral responses. Here, we propose a generalizable framework for cultural evaluation and intervention that transitions from abstract queries to scenario-based behavioral probing. By extracting implicit token probabilities across 300 situational dilemmas, we bypass surface-level alignment to map the latent coordinates of LLMs cultural value. We further introduce activation steering to shift these internal alignments during the forward pass without retraining. Across multiple LLMs, we find substantial variation in adaptability and uncover a consistent phenomenon of latent entanglement, where interventions along one cultural dimension induce shifts along another. These results suggest that cultural values are encoded as coupled structures, limiting precise alignment. This work establishes a computationally efficient framework for cultural steering, highlighting the structural complexities when navigating global value with LLMs.

</details>


### [133] [Memory Architectures for Multi-Turn Text-to-SQL: A Benchmark and Empirical Study](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.26394)
*Ravi Kumar Tummalapenta,Suman Addanki*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了EnterpriseMem-Bench——一个面向企业场景的多轮Text-to-SQL基准测试集，并系统评估了五种前沿大模型在不同记忆机制下的表现，发现工作记忆窗口大小起主导作用，而额外记忆组件效果不一致，甚至出现代际性能倒退现象。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有Text-to-SQL研究主要关注单轮任务，而实际企业分析多为多轮交互；缺乏具备确定性真值和细粒度记忆标注的多轮基准，难以解耦分析工作记忆、情景检索与语义增强等机制的影响。

Method: 构建了含300个会话、1400轮次的EnterpriseMem-Bench基准（覆盖BIRD金融、SEC EDGAR、Northwind三领域），引入Memory Benefit Score（MBS）作为每轮诊断指标，并在五种记忆条件下对五种前沿模型（含GPT-5系列与Claude Sonnet/Opus系列）进行系统评估，所有Claude模型启用扩展思考以与GPT推理能力对齐。

Result: （1）无状态多轮Text-to-SQL在第3轮执行准确率即归零；（2）记忆架构复杂度不带来单调增益，工作记忆主导性能，其他组件增益/损益达+14至-16个百分点；（3）Claude Sonnet 4.6在SEC EDGAR上较4.5倒退17–33个百分点；（4）启用推理后Claude错误分布变为单峰，所有错误均为错误结果型。

Conclusion: 多轮Text-to-SQL的核心瓶颈在于工作记忆建模，而非单纯增加记忆模块；当前前沿模型在企业多轮SQL生成中仍存在严重缺陷，尤其在跨文档/跨表上下文追踪方面，需更精细的记忆机制设计与评估范式。

Abstract: Multi-turn Text-to-SQL is central to enterprise analytics yet remains predominantly evaluated in single-turn settings. We introduce EnterpriseMem-Bench, a multi-turn Text-to-SQL benchmark of 300 sessions and 1,400 turns built programmatically from three enterprise domains (BIRD financial, SEC EDGAR, Northwind), with deterministic ground truth and per-turn memory-critical annotation. We evaluate five frontier models -- GPT-5 mini, GPT-5.2, Claude Sonnet 4.5, Sonnet 4.6, and Opus 4.6 -- across five memory conditions enabling a three-way ablation isolating working-memory window size, episodic retrieval, and semantic augmentation as independent effects. All Claude models are evaluated with extended thinking enabled to maintain parity with GPT reasoning models. We introduce the Memory Benefit Score (MBS) as a per-turn diagnostic metric. Four findings emerge: (1) stateless multi-turn Text-to-SQL collapses to zero execution accuracy by Turn 3 across all five models, even under reasoning; (2) memory-architecture complexity does not monotonically improve accuracy -- working memory dominates, and additional components produce model- and dataset-dependent effects from +14 to -16 percentage points; (3) Claude Sonnet 4.6 underperforms Sonnet 4.5 by 17-33pp on SEC EDGAR across conditions, a generational regression persisting under reasoning; (4) under reasoning, Claude error distributions become mono-modal -- every non-correct turn is a wrong-result error. We release the benchmark, agent, and evaluation code.

</details>


### [134] [QUACK: Questioning, Understanding, and Auditing Communicated Knowledge in Multimodal Social Deduction Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27068)
*Ye Yuan,Rui Song,Weien Li,Zeyu Li,Haochen Liu,Xiangyu Kong,Changjiang Han,Yonghan Yang,Zichen Zhao,Zixuan Dong,Fuyuan Lyu,Bowei He,Haolun Wu,Jikun Kang,Xue Liu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出QUACK框架，用于多模态社交推理中评估大语言模型代理的语言与感知行为的对齐程度，涵盖游戏结果、行为轨迹和话语一致性三个层面，并发现当前前沿视觉语言模型存在显著的空间幻觉和无依据指控问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有社交推理游戏环境仅依赖胜率等结果指标且局限于文本交互，难以判断代理语言是否真正基于其感知与行动，也无法定位行为失败的具体原因。

Method: 构建QUACK开源环境与评估框架，包含Statement Verification Pipeline：从引擎日志重建代理真实轨迹，并逐条验证讨论语句，自动检测空间幻觉、无依据指控、欺骗崩溃和语言-动作不一致等问题。

Result: 在同构与跨模型对抗设置下评估三个前沿视觉语言模型，最强代理仍幻觉15.1%可验证的空间陈述，超半数指控缺乏事实依据。

Conclusion: QUACK为多模态代理的语言接地性提供了细粒度、可解释的审计能力，揭示了当前VLM在社会推理中严重的接地缺陷，推动更可靠、可验证的智能体开发。

Abstract: Social deduction games have become a popular testbed for probing reasoning, deception, coordination, and belief modeling in Large Language Model (LLM) agents. However, most environments are scored only by game outcomes such as win rates and largely remain to text-only interaction, making it difficult to tell whether an agent's language is actually grounded in what it perceived and did, or to identify the failure modes underlying its behavior. To address this gap, we introduce QUACK, an open-source environment and evaluation framework for auditing the grounding of agent language in multimodal social reasoning. QUACK evaluates agents at three levels: game outcomes, behavioral trajectories, and utterance-level consistency. Its core Statement Verification Pipeline reconstructs each agent's ground-truth trajectory from engine logs and checks every discussion claim against it, automatically flagging spatial hallucination, unsupported accusation, deception collapse, and language-action inconsistency. Evaluating three frontier VLMs in both homogeneous and cross-model adversarial settings, we find that even the strongest agent hallucinates 15.1% of its verifiable spatial claims and makes over half of its accusations without grounded evidence. We release the full engine, evaluation framework, toolkit, and logs at https://github.com/AAAAA-Academia-Attractions/QUACK.

</details>


### [135] [Annotator Positionality as Signal: Psychometric Weighting for Anti-Autistic Ableism Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.26397)
*Naba Rizvi,Harper Strickland,Saleha Ahmedi,Nedjma Ousidhoum*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种针对反自闭症能力主义语言的偏见感知评估框架，强调社区贴近性和注释者立场，发现大语言模型常产生有害输出，依赖表面关键词匹配而非语境理解。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究虽已识别出大语言模型中的残障相关偏见，但尚不清楚其如何概念化或检测能力主义，尤其在影响自闭症群体的高风险决策场景中。

Method: 构建了一个以心理测量加权、社区贴近性为基准、基于注释者立场的偏见评估框架，并对比传统多数投票法，分析大语言模型对能力主义语言的识别与生成行为。

Result: 大语言模型频繁生成有害输出，误将社群内收编语言标记为能力主义，并在评估工具被遮蔽时表现出更负面的自闭症态度；错误分析显示其依赖表层关键词匹配，忽视说话者身份及语言语境（如群内团结 vs 群外伤害）。

Conclusion: 当前大语言模型在识别和处理能力主义语言方面存在系统性缺陷，亟需纳入社区声音与情境化评估标准以提升公平性与可靠性。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used in decision-making tasks where they can amplify or suppress perspectives, raising concerns in high-stakes settings affecting autistic communities. While previous research has identified disability-related biases in LLMs, it remains unclear how they conceptualize ableism or detect it in text. We introduce a bias-aware evaluation framework targeting anti-autistic ableist language with a psychometrically-weighted, community-proximate ground truth anchored in annotator positionality. This framework constitutes a stricter standard than conventional majority-vote aggregation which significantly and consistently underweights autistic and autism-accepting perspectives. We find that LLMs frequently produce harmful outputs, mislabel community-reclaimed language as ableist, and express more negative attitudes toward autistic people when assessment instruments are masked. Our error analysis reveals that models rely on surface-level keyword matching rather than contextual factors such as speaker identity, and whether the language fosters in-group solidarity or inflicts out-group harm.

</details>


### [136] [FAB-Bench: A Framework for Adaptive RAG Benchmarking in Semiconductor Manufacturing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.26476)
*Jingbin Qian,Congwen Yi,Min Xia,Wen Wu,Jun Zhu,Jian Guan*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出FAB-Bench，一个面向半导体制造领域的RAG系统自适应评测框架，定义六项诊断指标，支持4K–32K上下文尺度分析，揭示三种上下文扩展行为及注意力稀释是性能下降主因。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有RAG评估在垂直领域（如半导体制造）面临领域复杂、上下文尺度多样、依赖昂贵且不可扩展的专家评估等挑战。

Method: 构建FAB-Bench框架，定义六维诊断指标（事实准确性、上下文利用度、完整性、检索相关性、技术深度、推理一致性），结合检索器诊断与生成器级推理分析，在4K–32K token上下文窗口内量化检索精度与生成保真度的协同演化；基于1300+候选样本筛选200组高质量查询-答案对，覆盖三类合成策略；在4个LLM和4个RAG框架上系统评测，并在3个生产系统中验证可迁移性。

Result: 发现三种上下文扩展行为：对数增长、早期饱和、冷启动动态；确认注意力稀释是长上下文下性能下降的主要机制；跨框架验证表明FAB-Bench具备良好可移植性。

Conclusion: FAB-Bench为知识密集型垂直领域RAG系统提供了可扩展、可解释、自适应的端到端评测范式，推动RAG在高专业度场景中的可靠部署。

Abstract: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) has become critical for knowledge-intensive applications, yet evaluating its performance in vertical domains remains difficult due to domain complexity, diverse context scales, and heavy reliance on expert assessments that are costly, inconsistent, and non-scalable. We introduce FAB-Bench, an end-to-end framework for adaptive benchmarking of RAG systems in semiconductor manufacturing. FAB-Bench defines six diagnostic metrics measuring factual accuracy, contextual utilization, completeness, retrieval relevance, technical depth, and reasoning consistency. The framework couples retriever diagnostics with generator-level reasoning analysis across context windows of 4K-32K tokens, quantifying how retrieval precision and generative fidelity co-evolve as contextual scope expands. From over 1,300 generated candidates, we curated a high-quality benchmark of 200 query-answer pairs spanning three synthesis strategies: needle-in-haystack, intra-document multi-topic, and cross-document multi-hop. Systematic evaluation across four LLMs and four RAG frameworks reveals three distinct context-scaling behaviors: logarithmic growth, early saturation, and cold-start dynamics, and identifies attention dilution as the primary mechanism behind performance degradation at extreme context lengths. Cross-framework validation on three additional production RAG systems confirms evaluation portability.

</details>


### [137] [Towards Just-in-Time Adaptive Feedback: Enhancing Student Learning via Knowledge-Grounded LLM](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.26405)
*Younghun Lee,Amir Bralin,Nobel Sanjay Rebello,Dan Goldwasser*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于领域专家知识增强的LLM框架，用于在真实教学场景中提供适时、自适应的反馈，显著提升了学生表现，并验证了其促进概念转变的教学有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前研究缺乏在真实教学环境中提供适时（JiT）反馈的清晰方法，而教育干预对提升学习效果至关重要，LLM虽能规模化生成反馈，但需更好结合领域知识。

Method: 构建一个将LLM与领域专家知识相结合的框架：收集学生策略性文字推理（strategy essays），自动识别其中潜在错误类型，并据此生成非侵入式、概念澄清型反馈；在大规模大学课程（N>1000）中部署并分析学习轨迹。

Result: 该框架使学生成绩较往届提升超80%；学习轨迹分析表明，与LLM的迭代对话可有效帮助学生从错误概念转向正确认知。

Conclusion: 基于专家知识引导的LLM反馈框架在真实课堂中具有高可行性与强教学效用，为AI赋能教育提供了可扩展、可解释且以学习者为中心的新范式。

Abstract: Educational interventions are effective tools for enhancing student learning. While Large Language Models (LLMs) allow for generating adaptive feedback at scale, current studies lack clear methodologies for providing Just-in-Time (JiT) feedback in authentic instructional settings. In this paper, we present a framework that provides adaptive feedback by grounding LLMs with domain-specific expert knowledge. Our approach collects written reasoning logic (strategy essays) from students, analyzes potential error types based on the content of that reasoning, and delivers non-intrusive feedback designed to clarify missing or incorrect concepts. We deploy this framework in a large-scale university course (N > 1000), where it improved student performance by over 80% compared to previous semesters. Lastly, we validate the framework's pedagogical utility by analyzing the learning trajectories; we demonstrate how iterative conversations with LLM facilitate shifting one's misconception to correct understanding.

</details>


### [138] [Evidence Absence Is Not Evidence Insufficiency: Diagnosing NEI Construction Artifacts in Fact Verification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.26663)
*Jingxi Qiu,Zeyu Han,Cheng Huang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出NEI-CAP协议，用于诊断事实验证中'信息不足'(NEI)标签的评估问题，揭示当前模型在不同构造方式生成的NEI样本上泛化能力差，并指出聚合NEI得分可能掩盖模型实际解决的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有事实验证基准中，'信息不足'(NEI)标签的操作化定义不统一，导致模型学习偏差和评估结果误导；需一种构造感知的诊断方法来揭示模型在NEI识别上的真实能力。

Method: 提出构造感知的诊断协议NEI-CAP，包含构造家族标注、捷径线索审计、人工裁决验证及跨构造迁移测试；在SciFact风格科学验证任务中实例化，并以FEVER和HoVer为外部对照。

Result: 实验表明：NEI能力难以跨构造可靠迁移；依赖捷径线索训练的模型无法识别语义相关的不足证据；混合构造训练仅部分缩小差距；证据条件变化不仅影响NEI召回率，还干扰Support/Refute标签置信度。

Conclusion: 聚合NEI得分具有误导性，不能反映模型对证据充分性的真正理解；评估必须考虑NEI样本的构造方式，推动更鲁棒、可解释的事实验证模型发展。

Abstract: Evidence absence is not evidence insufficiency, but fact verification benchmarks can make them observationally similar. The Not Enough Information (NEI) label is often operationalized through different evidence conditions, and that choice silently determines what a verifier learns and what its score can hide. We introduce NEI-CAP, a construction-aware diagnostic protocol for insufficient-evidence evaluation. Each NEI example carries the construction family that produced it; NEI-CAP audits shortcut cues, validates hard cases through human adjudication, and tests whether competence transfers across constructions. We instantiate the protocol in SciFact-style scientific verification, with FEVER and HoVer as bounded external controls. Across these settings, NEI competence does not transfer reliably: models trained on shortcut-prone constructions fail to recognize semantically related insufficient evidence, and mixed-construction training narrows but does not close the gap. Fixed-claim diagnostics further show that the evidence condition shifts confidence in the reference Support/Refute label, not only NEI recall, so an aggregate NEI score can hide which problem a model has actually solved.

</details>


### [139] [Slide Deck Q&A Quality Assurance App: A Multi-Stage Pipeline for Pedagogical Question Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.26428)
*Jim Salsman*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出Slide Deck Q&A Quality Assurance (slidesqaqa)系统，通过四阶段大语言模型流水线联合处理文本与图像信息，生成教学上连贯、覆盖全面的高质量问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 从讲义幻灯片自动生成高质量、有教学价值的问题困难，因关键教学内容分布在文本和视觉元素中，且问题需跨整个演示流程进行教学脚手架设计，而非单张幻灯片孤立生成。

Method: 构建基于Flask的slidesqaqa系统，从PDF幻灯片中提取文本与渲染图像，经由窗口规划、讲义综合、幻灯片标注和一致性校验四个阶段的大语言模型流水线处理；联合建模多模态与教学角色，分配有限问题预算，并在讲义级修订标注以减少冗余、提升覆盖。

Result: 输出结构化JSON标注，含讲义级目标、章节结构、单页摘要、问题集及评估分数；初步实验表明系统可过滤非教学性幻灯片，并为视觉复杂内容生成高保真、教学连贯的问题。

Conclusion: 该系统有效解决了多模态讲义中跨幻灯片协同生成教学问题的挑战，提升了自动化问答生成的教学适用性与内容覆盖质量。

Abstract: Generating high-quality, pedagogically useful questions from lecture slide decks is difficult because important instructional content is distributed across both text and visual elements, and because useful questions must be scaffolded across the flow of a presentation rather than generated slide by slide in isolation. This paper describes Slide Deck Q\&A Quality Assurance (slidesqaqa), a Flask-based software system that extracts text and rendered images from PDF slides and processes them through a four-stage large language model pipeline comprising window planning, deck synthesis, slide annotation, and reconciliation. The system reasons jointly about slide modality and pedagogical role, allocates bounded question budgets, and revises draft annotations at the deck level to reduce redundancy and improve coverage. The final output is a structured JSON annotation containing deck-level goals, section structure, slide-level summaries, question sets, and evaluation scores. Initial experiments on two technical lecture decks indicate that the pipeline can filter non-instructional slides and produce high-fidelity, pedagogically coherent questions for visually complex content.
  The working system is at https://slidesqaqa-974767694043.us-west1.run.app
  The software repository is at https://github.com/blinding2submit/slidesqaqa

</details>


### [140] [Large Language Model-Powered Query-Driven Event Timeline Summarization in Industrial Search](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27066)
*Mingyue Wang,Xingyu Xie,Hang Yang,Li Gao,Lixin Su,Ge Chen,Dawei Yin,Daiting Shi*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: QDET是一个面向查询的事件时间线摘要系统，部署于百度搜索，通过多任务微调和强化学习，在小模型（7B）上实现了媲美超大模型（671B）的时间线摘要性能，并显著提升用户点击率与停留时长。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统主题中心方法难以应对搜索中关于突发新闻的查询需求，需从海量噪声文档中精准提取与查询强相关的子事件并构建聚焦时间线。

Method: 提出QDET系统：1）采用多任务监督微调（时序排序、因果判断、时间线补全）提升小模型在专业领域的性能；2）引入强化学习实现严格长度约束下的高质量事件摘要。

Result: 7B模型在时间线摘要F1达76.2%，略超671B模型零样本结果（76.1%），长度合规率达88.2%，约束满足率高出7.7分；线上A/B测试显示CTR提升5.5%，停留时长+4.6%，探索深度+4.4%；时间线理解能力可迁移到热度预测任务。

Conclusion: 领域专用优化可使轻量模型在关键指标上媲美巨型模型，大幅降低计算成本，具备生产落地价值。

Abstract: Understanding how events evolve over time is essential for search engines handling queries about trending news. We present QDET (Query-Driven Event Timeline Summarization), a production system deployed on Baidu Search that constructs focused event timelines to explain specific query events. Unlike traditional topic-centric approaches that aim for comprehensive coverage, QDET identifies and organizes sub-events closely relevant to the query from noisy candidate sets formed by millions of documents retrieved daily. QDET incorporates two key innovations: (1) multi-task supervised fine-tuning with three auxiliary tasks-temporal ordering, causal judgment, and timeline completion-that enable compact models to match the performance of much larger general-purpose models in specialized domains; (2) reinforcement learning-based event concise summarization that enforces strict length constraints while maintaining semantic quality, achieving 88.2% length compliance and outperforming 671B-scale models by 7.7 points in constraint satisfaction. Our fine-tuned 7B parameter model achieves 76.2% F1 score on timeline summarization, slightly surpassing the zero-shot performance of DeepSeek-R1-671B (76.1% F1) while using only 1% of its parameters-demonstrating that domain-specific optimization enables production-ready models with comparable quality at drastically reduced computational costs. Online A/B tests on Baidu Search validate real-world effectiveness, showing 5.5% CTR improvement, 4.6% longer dwell time, and 4.4% deeper exploration compared to single-task baselines. We further demonstrate that timeline understanding transfers to heat prediction, confirming effective knowledge transfer to downstream tasks.

</details>


### [141] [Probing Minimalist Phase Structure in LLMs: What Universal Dependencies Cannot Represent](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.26431)
*Yuanhao Chen,Peter Chin*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文通过设计特定的wh-movement刺激实验，检验大语言模型是否编码了超越通用依存关系（UD）标注所涵盖的形式句法抽象（如最简方案中的相边界和相内凝聚性），结果发现多个LLM表现出与相理论预测一致的梯度效应和符号不对称性，表明预训练可自发诱导出符合形式句法理论的表征。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 通用依存关系（UD）不编码相边界、相内凝聚性等形式句法抽象，因此基于UD的探针无法检验LLM是否具备此类结构知识；需设计UD距离不变但相结构不同的刺激来隔离并探测这些抽象。

Method: 构建三类wh-movement刺激（裸小句、不定式、限定式），其UD距离恒定但穿越的MP相边界数递增；在13个来自4个家族的LLM上使用结构探针检测激活模式，并结合激活修补（activation patching）验证因果性。

Result: 12/13模型在跨从句对上呈现相数梯度效应；13/13模型在UD距离相同但相结构不同的句内对上表现出显著符号不对称性（支持相内凝聚性）；12/13模型经激活修补验证该表征具因果作用。

Conclusion: 分布式的预训练足以诱导出与形式句法理论（如最简方案）对齐的深层结构表征；UD基探针仅提供句法编码的下界，而非上界。

Abstract: Structural probes train on Universal Dependencies (UD), which does not encode formal-syntactic abstractions such as phase boundaries or phase-internal cohesion. Whether large language models (LLMs) encode these remains an open question that UD-based probing cannot answer by construction. We evaluate structural probes on wh-movement stimuli where UD distances are invariant across conditions by design -- any non-zero effect therefore reflects structure beyond UD. The three conditions -- bare small clause, infinitival, and finite -- are ordered by the number of Minimalist Program (MP) phase boundaries the wh-element crosses.
  Across 13 LLMs from four families, we find a phase-count gradient on a cross-clause pair (12/13 models) and a 13/13 sign asymmetry on a within-clause pair whose UD distance is identical across conditions -- the latter specifically predicted by phase-internal cohesion, an MP abstraction invisible to UD by construction. Activation patching confirms the representations are causally active in 12/13 models. These findings suggest that distributional pretraining can induce representations aligned with formal-syntactic abstractions beyond the reach of annotation-based probing; UD-grounded probes provide a lower bound on syntactic encoding, not an upper bound.

</details>


### [142] [GraphReview: Scientific Paper Evaluation via LLM-Based Graph Message Passing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27204)
*Pujun Zheng,Wanying Ren,Jiacheng Yao,Guoxiu He,Star X. Zhao*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出GraphReview，一种基于图的LLM框架，通过在语义论文图上进行评审信号的消息传递来实现科学论文评估，统一建模论文内在质量、同期研究关联与历史文献关联，并利用个性化PageRank整合信号，在决策、排序和评审生成任务上显著优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于大语言模型（LLM）的论文评估方法通常孤立建模论文自身质量、同期研究关系和历史文献关联，缺乏跨论文传播评审证据的统一机制。

Method: 构建语义论文图，节点表示论文并由LLM估计质量先验，边表示论文间同步（同期）或历时（历史）关系并由LLM生成成对比较证据；采用Personalized PageRank聚合多源评审信号以支持质量排序、录用决策和评审文本生成；引入奖励引导的最大似然目标优化LLM训练。

Result: GraphReview在决策与排序指标上平均提升29.7%，其中准确率提升23.7%，Spearman's ρ提升57.6%；生成的评审文本质量更高，且在不同时间周期和会议 venues 上具有良好泛化性。

Conclusion: GraphReview通过图结构建模与LLM协同，实现了更全面、一致且可解释的论文评估范式，验证了跨论文评审信号传播的有效性与实用性。

Abstract: Scientific paper evaluation often involves not only assessing a manuscript itself, but also relating it to contemporaneous research and prior literature. However, existing LLM-based methods typically model these signals separately and lack a unified mechanism for propagating review evidence across papers. We propose $\textbf{GraphReview}$, a graph-based LLM framework that formulates paper evaluation as review-signal message passing over a semantic paper graph. The graph jointly captures intrinsic quality, synchronic links among contemporaneous papers, and diachronic links to prior work. LLMs are used to estimate node-level quality priors and generate edge-level comparative evidence through pairwise paper comparisons, while Personalized PageRank integrates review signals for quality ranking, decision prediction, and review generation. To produce higher-quality graph evidence, we propose reward-induced maximum likelihood objectives for training the LLM backbones. Experiments show that GraphReview consistently outperforms the strongest baseline, achieving average improvements of 29.7% on decision and ranking metrics, including gains of 23.7% in Accuracy and 57.6% in Spearman's $ρ$. It also produces higher-quality review texts and generalizes effectively across time periods and conference venues. The code is available at https://github.com/ECNU-Text-Computing/GraphReview.

</details>


### [143] [Vectors Are Not Neutral: Sensitive-Information Inference from Exported LLM Representations in Summarization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.26433)
*Weixin Liu,Bowen Qu,Juming Xiong,Congning Ni,Bradley A. Malin,Zhijun Yin*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文研究了大型语言模型（LLM）在生成摘要时导出的向量表示可能泄露敏感信息（如电子健康记录中的种族）的风险，提出SurfaceLoRA方法，通过梯度反转判别器降低目标向量中敏感信息的可恢复性，但未针对的向量仍存在较高泄露风险，强调隐私审计与防护需针对实际导出的具体向量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM摘要系统导出的向量可能在访问控制较弱的下游流程中被滥用，导致敏感信息推断，尤其在临床等高风险场景中亟需评估和缓解此类残余隐私风险。

Method: 以临床出院摘要生成为案例，以EHR中记录的种族为敏感标签进行审计；分别评估最终token隐藏状态和均值池化提示表示两种导出向量的敏感信息可恢复性；提出SurfaceLoRA——一种面向导出向量的参数高效微调方法，将梯度反转判别器连接至指定导出向量以抑制敏感信息。

Result: 降低某一导出向量（如final-token）的敏感标签可恢复性，并不保证另一向量（如pooled）同样降低；SurfaceLoRA能将目标final-token向量的种族可恢复性降至近随机水平且保持摘要质量，但未目标化的pooled向量仍具显著可恢复性。

Conclusion: 隐私审计与缓解措施必须针对系统实际保留或暴露给下游组件的具体向量表示，不能泛化或假设跨向量的一致性。

Abstract: Large language model (LLM) summarization systems may pass compact vector representations of private inputs to downstream retrieval, monitoring, audit, or analytic workflows. Even when source documents remain access-restricted, derived vectors may be handled under different access controls and still support sensitive-information inference, creating a residual information-disclosure risk. We study this issue in clinical discharge-summary generation as a high-stakes case study, using electronic health record (EHR)-recorded race as a controlled sensitive-label audit. We audit two artifacts that a system might retain or expose to downstream components: the final prompt-token hidden state and the mean-pooled prompt representation. Our results show that reducing recoverability of the case-study sensitive label from one exported artifact does not necessarily reduce recoverability from another. As a mitigation case study, we introduce SurfaceLoRA, an exported-vector-targeted parameter-efficient fine-tuning method that uses a gradient-reversal discriminator attached to a designated exported vector. Under a balanced five-way probing protocol, SurfaceLoRA reduces EHR-recorded race recoverability from the targeted final-token artifact toward chance while preserving summarization utility, yet recoverability remains substantially higher from untargeted pooled artifacts. These findings show that privacy auditing and mitigation should be performed on the exact vector artifact retained or exposed to downstream components.

</details>


### [144] [The Coverage Illusion: From Pre-retrieval Routing Failure to Post-retrieval Cascades in a Production RAG System](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27220)
*Zafar Hussain,Kristoffer Nielbo*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文揭示了RAG系统中查询增强（如HyDE）在真实生产流量中被过度使用的现象，提出‘覆盖幻觉’概念，并设计了一种无需训练、基于后检索级联的低成本工作流调度策略，显著提升质量、降低延迟并减少LLM调用。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有RAG系统对所有查询统一应用LLM查询增强（如HyDE），带来高昂推理开销和延迟，但其在真实生产环境中的必要性缺乏实证支撑；作者旨在探究真实用户查询中真正需要LLM增强的比例，并解释合成数据与真实数据间的评估偏差。

Method: 在丹麦国家百科全书生产系统上开展案例研究，分析2万组真实与合成查询-工作流对；提出‘Coverage Illusion’概念，验证预检索路由无法识别增强需求，进而设计一种后检索、 cheapest-first 的级联工作流调度机制，按成本升序执行不同检索策略，仅在前序步骤无结果时才触发LLM增强。

Result: 发现真实流量中仅27.8%查询需LLM增强（合成数据高估为>90%）；所提级联策略相比Always-HyDE提升Composite Overall指标0.140分、降低端到端延迟31.8%，且72.2%查询完全规避LLM调用；四种ML范式均无法在检索前准确预测是否需增强。

Conclusion: LLM查询增强不应默认应用于所有查询；真实场景中其需求具有后检索依赖性，应通过轻量级、无训练、后检索级联机制动态决策，以兼顾效果、效率与成本。

Abstract: In modern RAG pipelines, query augmentation methods such as HyDE and query expansion are applied to every query, resulting in substantial LLM inference costs and increased end-to-end latency. The empirical justification for this overhead in real production traffic remains largely unexplored. We present a case study of the Danish National Encyclopedia, evaluating five retrieval workflows over 20,000 query-workflow pairs from production traffic and synthetic conditions. In this system, synthetic queries suggest that LLM augmentation is needed for over 90% of queries to achieve high retrieval coverage. However, under our production deferral policy, only 27.8% of real user queries need LLM augmentation. We call this gap the Coverage Illusion and attribute it to a structural mismatch between synthetic and real query distributions. Pre-retrieval routing cannot resolve this gap, as the need for LLM augmentation is only revealed after searching the index, a result confirmed by our evaluation of four machine learning paradigms. The coverage gap, undetectable from the query alone, motivates a post-retrieval cascade that runs workflows in cheapest-first order and escalates to LLM augmentation only when a step returns no documents. Operating entirely without training overhead or secondary serving infrastructure, the cascade improves quality by +0.140 Composite Overall points over Always-HyDE, reduces latency by 31.8%, and serves 72.2% of real user queries without LLM augmentation.

</details>


### [145] [Targeted Remasking: Replacing Token Editing with Token-to-Mask Refinement in Discrete Diffusion Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.26436)
*Lin Yao*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出Token-to-Mask（T2M）remasking方法，替代LLaDA2.1中的Token-to-Token（T2T）编辑机制，通过将疑似错误token重置为mask状态，让扩散模型在更干净的上下文中重新预测，从而提升生成精度，尤其在数学等需精确输出的任务中效果显著。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: T2T编辑机制存在三大缺陷：错误检测与替换耦合、污染生成上下文、训练-推理噪声不匹配；需一种无需训练、即插即用的改进方案。

Method: 提出T2M remasking——将可疑错误token重设为mask而非直接替换；设计三种互补的错误检测策略（基于概率、触发镜像、时序差分），并提供统一理论分析。

Result: 在12个涵盖知识、推理、数学、编程和指令遵循的基准上验证有效；数学任务CMATH提升5.92%；错误分析显示T2M修复了59.4%的‘最后一英里’答案污染问题。

Conclusion: T2M是一种训练无关、即插即用的改进方案，能净化上下文、对齐噪声类型、支持多位置联合优化，显著提升离散掩码扩散语言模型在高精度任务上的表现。

Abstract: Discrete masked diffusion language models such as LLaDA generate text through iterative denoising, where mask tokens are progressively replaced with predicted tokens. LLaDA2.1 introduced a Token-to-Token (T2T) editing mechanism that accelerates generation by directly replacing committed tokens suspected of being incorrect. However, we identify fundamental limitations of T2T editing: it couples error detection with replacement, pollutes the generation context with potentially incorrect tokens, and introduces a train-inference noise mismatch where systematic model-generated errors differ from the random perturbations seen during training. We propose Token-to-Mask (T2M) remasking, a training-free, drop-in replacement for T2T editing that resets suspected erroneous tokens back to the mask state, allowing the diffusion process to re-predict them under cleaner context. We design and empirically validate three complementary error detection strategies -- probability-based, trigger-mirrored, and temporal-difference-based -- and provide a unified theoretical analysis showing that T2M remasking purifies the generation context, converts systematic inference errors back to the model's native mask noise type, and enables delayed commitment for joint multi-position optimization. Comprehensive experiments across 12 benchmarks spanning knowledge, reasoning, mathematics, coding, and instruction following show that T2M generally improves performance on tasks requiring precise token-level output, with the largest gain on mathematics (+5.92% on CMATH). Error analysis on CMATH reveals that the dominant failure mode is last-mile token corruption -- where correct reasoning produces a corrupted final answer -- and that T2M repairs 59.4% of such cases.

</details>


### [146] [Separating Semantic Competition from Context Length in RAG Reading](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27294)
*Vyzantinos Repantis,Ameya Gawde,Harshvardhan Singh,Rohit Alekar,Cien Zhang,Svetlana Karslioglu,Akash Vishwakarma*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种匹配对照协议来研究RAG系统中reader模块的失败原因，发现答案提取性能下降主要源于竞争性干扰而非上下文长度，并通过替换竞争性段落验证了该结论。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究RAG系统中reader模块在正确段落已被检索到的情况下仍出错的原因：是因上下文过长，还是因其他看似相关但错误的段落构成真实竞争？

Method: 提出并应用一种匹配对照协议：固定段落数量与长度，仅将强竞争性干扰段落替换为弱竞争性真实段落；在SQuAD数据集上对Phi-2和Qwen2.5-1.5B两个轻量开源模型进行实验；引入保留率曲线及右删失半衰期量化竞争累积效应。

Result: 段落竞争性降低显著提升F1与答案包含率（answer inclusion），Exact Match也有明显改善：Phi-2恢复+6.0 EM、+7.0 answer-inclusion、+0.057 F1；Qwen2.5-1.5B恢复+4.5 EM、+9.0 answer-inclusion、+0.068 F1；效果在F1和answer inclusion上更显著，且受片段长度影响。

Conclusion: RAG reader的性能下降主要源于检索段落间的语义竞争效应，而非单纯上下文长度增加；该竞争效应可被所提对照协议有效隔离与量化，但其影响程度因指标（EM/F1/answer inclusion）和段落长度而异。

Abstract: Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) systems can respond incorrectly even when the correct passage was retrieved. The model must still read the retrieved passages and identify which one contains the answer among others that look relevant. This passage-reading model is called the reader. Does it fail simply because the context is longer or because the other passages genuinely compete with the correct one? We introduce and demonstrate a matched-control protocol for RAG reading: we keep the number and length of passages fixed, but replace hard competitors with less competitive real passages. We apply this control across two compact open models on SQuAD. This replacement partially restores performance, with the strongest effects on F1 and answer inclusion. For Phi-2, this recovers +6.0 EM points, +7.0 answer-inclusion points, and +0.057 F1. For Qwen2.5-1.5B, it recovers +4.5 EM points, +9.0 answer-inclusion points, and +0.068 F1. To track how performance changes as competitors accumulate, we also report retention curves and summarize them with a right-censored half-life when the curves do not cross half-retention. Together, these results show the protocol isolates a competition effect distinct from context length, though the effect is clearer for F1 and answer inclusion than for exact match, and also varies with snippet length.

</details>


### [147] [LURE: Live-Usage Replay Evaluations for Reducing Evaluation Awareness](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.26438)
*Igor Ivanov,David Demitri Africa*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出LURE方法，通过回放真实代理交互轨迹并在末尾添加评估提示，构建更贴近实际部署的评估方式，以解决大语言模型在评估中表现出的‘评估意识’问题，从而提升安全与对齐基准的有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大型语言模型具有‘评估意识’，即能识别自身正被评估并因此改变行为，这削弱了现有安全与对齐基准的有效性。

Method: 提出LURE（Live-Usage Replay Evaluations）方法：回放真实代理交互轨迹，并在末尾附加评估提示；同时构建自动化评估真实性度量管道，结合对‘评估意识’的语言表达检测与判别模型对日志是否为评估的预测概率。

Result: LURE构建的评估比主流基准和合成评估生成器更难与真实部署区分，甚至接近真实用户对话的真实性；并在‘阴谋行为’、‘AI安全破坏’和‘谄媚行为’等场景中成功实例化。

Conclusion: 评估真实性是衡量对齐基准质量的关键属性，应在报告基准结果时一并披露，尤其当这些结果用于安全论证时。

Abstract: Large language models can recognize when they are being evaluated (evaluation awareness) and behave differently because of that, which undermines the validity of safety and alignment benchmarks. We propose LURE (Live-Usage Replay Evaluations), a method for constructing deployment-like evaluations by replaying realistic agentic interaction trajectories and appending evaluation prompt at the end. We also introduce an automated pipeline for measuring evaluation realism, combining detection of verbalized evaluation awareness and judge-model estimates of the probability of logs being an evaluation, and validate it on a large dataset of deployment and evaluation transcripts. We find that LURE-based evaluations are substantially less distinguishable from deployment than widely used benchmarks and synthetic evaluation generators, and can approach the realism of real conversations with users. We instantiate LURE in scheming, AI safety sabotage, and sycophancy settings. Our results suggest that evaluation realism is a crucial property of alignment benchmarks and should be reported alongside benchmark results, especially when such results are used in safety cases.

</details>


### [148] [Conv-to-Bench: Evaluating Language Models Via User-Assistant Dialogues In Code Tasks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.26440)
*Victor M. dos Santos,Andre C. Castro,Samuel L. de S. Toledo,Bruno M. L. Calura,Lisandra C. de M. Menezes,Raul C. R. Mata,Telma W. de L. Soares,Bryan L. M. de Oliveira*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出Conv-to-Bench框架，利用真实多轮对话自动生成可验证的结构化评估清单，显著提升LLM评估基准的可扩展性与成本效益。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统LLM评估基准依赖人工专家标注，难以跟上大模型快速发展步伐，亟需自动化、可扩展的评估方法。

Method: 提出多阶段框架Conv-to-Bench，从真实用户-助手多轮对话中提取‘教学式演进’模式，将碎片化用户意图解构为整合指令和二元评估标准；在编程领域应用，并结合LLM-as-a-judge验证范式。

Result: 生成的评估集与BigCodeBench等人工基准高度一致（Spearman ρ = 1.000），LLM裁判与人工真值具实质性一致性（Cohen’s κ = 0.705）；消融表明多轮交互建模意图演化，但指令中心提取更鲁棒。

Conclusion: Conv-to-Bench为面向用户场景不断拓展的AI应用，提供了高保真、低成本、可扩展的评估新范式。

Abstract: The rapid advancement of Large Language Models (LLMs) has outpaced the scalability of traditional evaluation benchmarks, which remain heavily dependent on labor-intensive expert curation. We address this bottleneck with Conv-to-Bench, a multi-stage framework that automatically transforms authentic multi-turn user-assistant dialogues into structured, verifiable requirement checklists. By leveraging the "instructional evolution" found in real-world conversational logs, our approach deconstructs fragmented user intent into consolidated instructions and binary evaluation criteria. Applied to the programming domain, Conv-to-Bench produces evaluation sets that demonstrate near-perfect alignment with human-authored standards like BigCodeBench, achieving Spearman correlations of up to $ρ$ = 1.000 with significantly lower computational overhead. Validation of the LLM-as-a-judge framework further confirms its reliability, with the primary evaluator achieving substantial agreement with human-verified ground truth ($κ$ = 0.705). Our comprehensive ablation studies reveal that while multi-turn interactions capture the iterative evolution of user intent, instruction-centric extraction provides a more robust foundation. Ultimately, Conv-to-Bench provides a scalable, cost-effective paradigm for maintaining high-fidelity evaluation standards as user-centric AI applications continue to diversify.

</details>


### [149] [Alignment Tuning for Large Language Models: A Data-Centric Lens on Alignment Data Pipelines](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.26442)
*Hwanjun Song*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文从数据驱动的角度重新审视对齐调优，将其视为一个管道设计问题，并提出包含响应合成、偏好评估和偏好实例化的三阶段框架，以统一分类现有方法、揭示设计权衡与失效模式，并提炼出指导原则，最后指出若干开放挑战。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有对齐调优研究多聚焦于优化目标，而对齐数据的构建常被隐式处理；本文旨在弥补这一缺口，强调数据构造的核心作用。
